per_question.original_draft: [synth-001] We present RA-MoE, a sparse mixture-of-experts architecture in which router logits are biased toward experts whose recent activation history minimizes inter-device communication.
per_question.original_published: [synth-001] We present RA-MoE, a sparse mixture-of-experts architecture in which router logits are biased toward experts whose recent activation history minimizes inter-device communication.

per_question.original_draft: [synth-002] Standard dense retrievers degrade on documents longer than their training context.
per_question.original_published: [synth-002] Standard dense retrievers degrade on documents longer than their training context.

per_question.original_draft: [synth-008] We extract activation steering vectors that increase a model's adherence to its system prompt in the presence of injected adversarial user instructions.
per_question.original_published: [synth-008] We extract activation steering vectors that increase a model's adherence to its system prompt in the presence of injected adversarial user instructions.
